share.note: Shares a clean link to this tool. No tracking.
share.noteLocal: Shares the link only. Nothing from your audit leaves your device.

marketplace.title: MarketMe
marketplace.subtitle: Add tools to your workspace
marketplace.signInBanner: Sign in to activate tools and save your workspace.

forge-me.description: Generate synthetic datasets with injected anomalies - nulls, duplicates, outliers and more. Define your schema, set the rate, then export or pipe directly into AnalyzeMe.

analyze-me.description: Upload a CSV or JSON and detect missing values, duplicates, and outliers entirely in your browser. No server, no uploads, no logs - powered by DuckDB-Wasm.

panel.emptyState: Open a service from the menu above

mobileGate.note: This tool works with file drops, wide tables, and side panels - it needs a bigger screen. Open it on a computer for the full experience.
mobileGate.roadmapHint: You can still read the roadmap and vote on what's next from the tabs above.

seo.description: Free browser tools for data teams. Generate synthetic datasets with injected anomalies, detect issues in CSV/JSON - no sign-up, no server, no uploads.
seo.titleDefault: StackMe - We Build Tools. Not Traps.
seo.titleAnalyzeMe: AnalyzeMe - CSV & JSON Anomaly Detector - StackMe

account.emailNote: We do not store or share your email address. It comes straight from your sign-in and only you can see it here.
account.nicknameNote: Displayed under your actions on the site. You can change it anytime.
account.nicknameTaken: This nickname is already taken. Please choose another.

contact.title: Contact the team
contact.lead: Spotted a bug or have an idea? Write to us - anything at all.
contact.emailPlaceholder: Email - only if you want a reply (optional)
